component.name: DPH Asistent
component.summary: Track Czech VAT records, control statements and issue invoices
Evidence podkladů k DPH, kontrolní hlášení a vystavování faktur

description.p: DPH Asistent is a desktop application for keeping Czech VAT records, generating EPO XML batches (VAT return and control statement) and issuing invoices. Data is stored locally in a SQLite database.
DPH Asistent je desktopová aplikace pro evidenci podkladů k českému přiznání k DPH, kontrolnímu hlášení a vystavování faktur. Data ukládá lokálně do SQLite databáze.

ul.li: VAT period records with automatic base, VAT and gross amount calculation (21 %, 12 %, 0 %)
Issued, received and reverse-charge documents with foreign currency support (CNB rate)
ARES subject lookup and tax office directory
EPO XML export for the VAT return and the control statement
Issued invoices with PDF output and QR payment
Import of historical EPO XML files and local database backup/restore

description.p: The application helps with record keeping and XML generation for EPO, but does not replace an accountant, a tax advisor, or a final check in the EPO portal before filing.

screenshot.caption: Přehled období DPH a evidence dokladů
VAT period overview and document records
